policy.purpose: Validate formal137 as the active runtime ML feature contract and keep feature-selection/retrain/release gates auditable.
policy.sequence_family_rule: Sequence family keeps its validated sequence contract; this preflight only governs tabular/tree/TabM candidate evidence.

activation_plan.stage_0_current_state: production FEATURE_COLS resolves from formal137 registry.
activation_plan.stage_1_candidate_pool: Use the 137 ml_training_view as the governed feature-selection candidate pool.
activation_plan.stage_2_selection: Feature selection may pick from formal137 candidate features; high-duplicate candidates are penalized by similarity contract.
activation_plan.stage_3_retrain: Retrain must produce a model artifact with explicit feature schema lineage before any production activation.
activation_plan.stage_4_release: Release gate compares IC/RankIC, walk-forward lift, PBO/Deflated Sharpe, runtime, and L1.5/L4 diversity before promotion.
activation_plan.rollback: Rollback requires an explicit legacy106 branch/artifact pointer; runtime must not silently fallback.
